title: Zoho Mail OTP Not Received
description: Troubleshooting OTP or verification code not received for Zoho Mail login.

steps.title: Check Spam or Junk Folder
steps.instruction:
*📁 Step 1: Check Spam / Junk Folder*
• Open your inbox (or the backup email you registered with Zoho).
• Go to the *Spam* or *Junk* folder.
• Look for an email from Zoho with the subject like "Your OTP" or "Zoho Verification Code".
• If found, mark it as *Not Spam* and use the code.
_Expected: OTP email is found in Spam folder._

steps.title: Check Your Phone Signal (SMS OTP)
steps.instruction:
*📱 Step 2: Check Your Phone Signal (If OTP is sent via SMS)*
• Ensure your phone has a good mobile signal or is connected to the internet (for WhatsApp OTP).
• Check if your phone number registered with Zoho is correct.
• Wait up to 3 minutes — SMS OTPs can sometimes be delayed.
_Expected: OTP arrives on your registered phone._

steps.title: Use Backup OTP or Authenticator App
steps.instruction:
*🔐 Step 3: Use Backup OTP or Authenticator App*
• If you have the *Zoho OneAuth* or *Google Authenticator* app set up, open it.
• Use the 6-digit code shown in the app — it refreshes every 30 seconds.
• If you have backup codes saved earlier, use one of them.
_Expected: Backup OTP or authenticator code allows login._

steps.title: Try a Different Browser or Clear Cache
steps.instruction:
*🌐 Step 4: Try a Different Browser or Clear Cache*
• Try opening Zoho Mail in a different browser (e.g., Chrome, Edge).
• Or open an *Incognito / Private browsing* window and try again.
• Clear browser cookies: *Ctrl + Shift + Delete* → Check Cookies → Clear data.
_Expected: OTP delivery issue is isolated to browser state._

steps.title: Contact IT Support
steps.instruction:
*🎫 Step 5: Contact IT Support*
• If you still haven't received the OTP after trying all steps, it could be an account-level issue.
• Please raise a support ticket with the following info:
  - Your Zoho registered email address
  - The phone number on file (last 4 digits)
  - Time when you tried to log in
_Expected: IT team resets OTP delivery or updates account settings._
